name: 中通り (Nakadōri)
author: ahkimn
description:
# 中通り (Nakadōri) ### FKS Part of the [Japan Map Pack](https://github.com/ahkimn/subwaybuilder-jp-maps). Highly-detailed map of the historic region of 中通り (Nakadōri) in 福島県 (Fukushima Prefecture), covering the valley of the 阿武隈川 (Abukuma River) from 郡山 (Kōriyama) to 福島 (Fukushima). ## Coverage
Metropolitan Area(s)福島市, 郡山市
Municipalities18 cities/towns/villages
Playable Area6,107 km²

## Methodology Resident and commuter totals are derived from employed persons (就業者数) and workers (従業者数) per small census area (小地域), refined by 500m labor mesh and 250m/100m resident mesh to achieve sub-district point placement. Population counts are conserved at the 小地域 level, and point placement is optimized via a mesh-aware loss function. Commute patterns are modeled using a gravity model augmented by known origin-destination flows at the municipality (市町村) or designated city ward (区) level. ## Data Sources - 令和2年国勢調査 (2020 National Census) — [e-Stat](https://www.e-stat.go.jp/) - 令和3年経済センサス (2021 Economic Census) — [e-Stat](https://www.e-stat.go.jp/) - 簡易100mメッシュ人口 (100m Mesh Population) — [GTFS-GIS](https://gtfs-gis.jp/teikyo/) - 国土数値情報 (National Land Numerical Information) — [MLIT](https://nlftp.mlit.go.jp/) - 空港管理状況調査 (Airport Management Statistics) — [MLIT Aviation](https://www.mlit.go.jp/koku/15_bf_000185.html) - 港湾調査 (Port Survey) — [MLIT Ports](https://www.mlit.go.jp/k-toukei/kouwan.html) - 大学ポートレート (University Portraits) — [JASSO](https://portraits.niad.ac.jp/) - 学校基本調査 (School Basic Survey) — [MEXT](https://www.mext.go.jp/) - 観光統計 (Tourism Statistics) — [JNTO](https://statistics.jnto.go.jp/) - Overture Maps Foundation — [Overture](https://overturemaps.org/) - 海しる / J-EGG500 (Ocean Information / Bathymetry) — [MSIL](https://www.msil.go.jp/) / [JODC](https://www.jodc.go.jp/) ## License This map data is released under the [MIT License](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT). ## Attribution Data derived from the following government and public data sources. See **Data Sources** above for links. - **Population & Commuting**: 令和2年国勢調査 (2020 National Census), 令和3年経済センサス (2021 Economic Census) - **Geospatial**: 国土数値情報 (National Land Numerical Information), Overture Maps Foundation - **Institutions**: 学校基本調査, 大学ポートレート, 空港管理状況調査, 港湾調査 - **Tourism**: 観光統計 (Tourism Statistics) - **Bathymetry**: 海しる / J-EGG500
